title: Kinetic Hosting Addition
description: Adds a button to the main menu that links to your Kinetic Affiliate link.
body:
# Kinetic Hosting Addition
A cosmetic mod for Kinetic Hosting Affiliates and Partners.

## What's added?
The main menu now has a button saying `Create a server!` that will redirect to your affiliate link.
There's also the Kinetic logo on the top left that if clicked will also redirect to your link.

## How do I set my link?
Assuming you're using this for modpacks (Why else would you be using this?),
### Fabric
You can find the config file `kinetic_hosting_affiliate_config.json` in the `config` folder of your game. Simply edit the link, re-launch the game, and you're done.
### Forge
Forge is coming soon.

## More configuration options
There's also settings to display the logo or not, the logo position and the logo scale.
